name: Tidy First

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: book-tidy-first Tidy First  Small, behavior-preserving structural improvements a

summary: Small, behavior-preserving structural improvements are treated as an engineering decision tool, not as broad refactoring theater.

name: 코드 정리법

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: part-code-tidying 코드 정리법  A catalog of small code moves that improve local reada

summary: A catalog of small code moves that improve local readability, symmetry, and future change paths without changing observable behavior.

name: 관리

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: part-management 관리  Guidance for separating, sequencing, batching, and timing ti

summary: Guidance for separating, sequencing, batching, and timing tidying work so it fits real delivery constraints.

name: 이론

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: part-theory 이론  A design-economics frame that links structure, behavior, time va

summary: A design-economics frame that links structure, behavior, time value, options, coupling, and cohesion.

name: 보호 구문

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-guard-clauses 보호 구문  Use early exits to make preconditions and exceptional

summary: Use early exits to make preconditions and exceptional cases explicit, while keeping the change small enough to review safely.

name: 안 쓰는 코드 삭제

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-delete-dead-code 안 쓰는 코드 삭제  Remove unused code in small steps when version

summary: Remove unused code in small steps when version control can recover it, reducing noise before deeper changes.

name: 대칭으로 맞추기

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-symmetry 대칭으로 맞추기  Make similar code follow a shared shape so differences c

summary: Make similar code follow a shared shape so differences carry meaning and repeated decisions become easier to see.

name: 새 인터페이스로 기존 루틴 부르기

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-new-interface 새 인터페이스로 기존 루틴 부르기  Create the interface you want, wrap the e

summary: Create the interface you want, wrap the existing routine behind it, then migrate callers gradually instead of rewriting everything at once.

name: 읽는 순서

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-reading-order 읽는 순서  Arrange code so a reader can follow the main idea in a

summary: Arrange code so a reader can follow the main idea in a natural sequence with fewer jumps and less retained context.

name: 응집도를 높이는 배치

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-cohesion-layout 응집도를 높이는 배치  Place related elements near each other when lo

summary: Place related elements near each other when locality clarifies the change, while recognizing that layout can reveal later extraction opportunities.

name: 선언과 초기화를 함께 옮기기

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-move-declaration-init 선언과 초기화를 함께 옮기기  Keep declaration and initialization

summary: Keep declaration and initialization close enough that the reader sees value creation and use without unnecessary searching.

name: 설명하는 변수

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-explaining-variable 설명하는 변수  Name an intermediate expression when the name

summary: Name an intermediate expression when the name explains intent and lets the structural change stay separate from behavior work.

name: 설명하는 상수

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-explaining-constant 설명하는 상수  Replace obscure literal values with named cons

summary: Replace obscure literal values with named constants when the name captures meaning rather than merely restating the value.

name: 명시적인 매개변수

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-explicit-parameters 명시적인 매개변수  Make inputs visible at the boundary when imp

summary: Make inputs visible at the boundary when implicit or packed data hides what the routine actually needs.

name: 비슷한 코드끼리

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-similar-code 비슷한 코드끼리  Gather similar code so repetition, variation, and a

summary: Gather similar code so repetition, variation, and a possible next extraction become easier to inspect.

name: 도우미 추출

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-extract-helper 도우미 추출  Extract a small helper when a named subtask improves

summary: Extract a small helper when a named subtask improves comprehension or prepares for a cleaner dependency boundary.

name: 하나의 더미

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-one-pile 하나의 더미  Temporarily collect scattered related fragments into one p

summary: Temporarily collect scattered related fragments into one place to see the shape of the change before extracting a better unit.

name: 설명하는 주석

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-explaining-comment 설명하는 주석  Use comments to record intent, constraints, or

summary: Use comments to record intent, constraints, or unresolved reasoning when the code cannot yet carry that meaning directly.

name: 불필요한 주석 지우기

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-delete-redundant-comment 불필요한 주석 지우기  Delete comments that duplicate obviou

summary: Delete comments that duplicate obvious code or have become misleading, because stale explanations increase reader cost.

name: 코드 정리와 동작 변경 구분

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: management-separate-tidy-behavior 코드 정리와 동작 변경 구분  Keep structural tidying and b

summary: Keep structural tidying and behavior changes distinguishable so review, rollback, and reasoning remain cheaper.

name: 연쇄적인 정리

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: management-chained-tidying 연쇄적인 정리  One small tidy can reveal another, but the c

summary: One small tidy can reveal another, but the chain should be controlled by whether each step still serves the current goal.

name: 코드 정리의 일괄처리량

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: management-batch-size 코드 정리의 일괄처리량  Choose a batch size that keeps feedback and

summary: Choose a batch size that keeps feedback and review cheap while avoiding constant interruption of useful flow.

name: 리듬

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: management-rhythm 리듬  Tidying works best as a steady rhythm of small adjustments

summary: Tidying works best as a steady rhythm of small adjustments rather than rare, risky cleanup campaigns.

name: 얽힘 풀기

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: management-untangling 얽힘 풀기  When structural and behavioral edits are tangled, b

summary: When structural and behavioral edits are tangled, back out or split work until the reviewable units are clear again.

name: 코드 정리 시점

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: management-when-to-tidy 코드 정리 시점  Decide whether to tidy now, later, separately,

summary: Decide whether to tidy now, later, separately, or not at all by weighing immediate change cost against future option value.

name: 요소와 관계

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: theory-elements-relations 요소와 관계  Software structure can be reasoned about as el

summary: Software structure can be reasoned about as elements and their relationships; tidying changes those relationships to make future work easier.

name: 구조와 동작

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: theory-structure-behavior 구조와 동작  Behavior is what the system does; structure is

summary: Behavior is what the system does; structure is how the system is organized to make behavior changes possible or expensive.

name: 경제 이론

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: theory-economics 경제 이론  Tidying is framed as an economic decision about cost, ti

summary: Tidying is framed as an economic decision about cost, timing, uncertainty, and the value of preserving future choices.

name: 시간가치

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: theory-time-value 시간가치  The timing of cost and benefit matters; a small cost tod

summary: The timing of cost and benefit matters; a small cost today must be justified against the value it creates before later work.

name: 옵션

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: theory-options 옵션  Structural improvement can be valuable because it preserves o

summary: Structural improvement can be valuable because it preserves or creates options under uncertainty, even before a specific feature payoff appears.

name: 되돌릴 수 있는 구조 변경

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: theory-reversible-structure 되돌릴 수 있는 구조 변경  Prefer reversible structural steps w

summary: Prefer reversible structural steps when uncertainty is high, because reversibility limits regret and keeps future paths open.

name: 결합도

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: theory-coupling 결합도  Coupling is the cost created when one element's change forc

summary: Coupling is the cost created when one element's change forces knowledge or changes in another element.

name: 콘스탄틴의 등가성

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: theory-constantine-equivalence 콘스탄틴의 등가성  The cost of software is strongly shape

summary: The cost of software is strongly shaped by the cost of changing it, so structure matters through its effect on change cost.

name: 결합도 제거

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: theory-decoupling 결합도 제거  Decoupling is justified when it lowers expected future

summary: Decoupling is justified when it lowers expected future change cost more than the structural work costs now.

name: 응집도

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: theory-cohesion 응집도  Cohesion groups related elements so changes have a clearer

summary: Cohesion groups related elements so changes have a clearer home, but it must be balanced against the cost of new boundaries.

name: OCR 원문 검수 주의

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: warning-unreviewed-ocr OCR 원문 검수 주의  The private source was built from OCR text

summary: The private source was built from OCR text with unclear markers, so use the graph for summarized guidance and avoid exact quotation claims.

name: Small tidy recovery decision

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: decision-small-tidy-recovery Small tidy recovery decision  죽은 코드 삭제나 작은 정리는 되돌릴

summary: 죽은 코드 삭제나 작은 정리는 되돌릴 수 있는 범위로 작게 수행해야 하며, 나중에 필요하면 복구하거나 더 나은 형태로 다시 작성할 수 있다는 판단을 전제로 한다.

name: Option value under volatility

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: theory-option-value-volatility Option value under volatility  설계 옵션은 변동성이 클수록 가치

summary: 설계 옵션은 변동성이 클수록 가치가 커지므로, 지금 확정하지 않아도 되는 구조 선택은 되돌릴 수 있게 만들어 미래 선택권을 보존하는 관점으로 평가한다.

name: Bias toward reversible structure

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: decision-reversible-structure-bias Bias toward reversible structure  대부분의 구조 변경은

summary: 대부분의 구조 변경은 되돌릴 수 있는지 먼저 따져야 하며, 되돌리기 쉬운 변경은 큰 설계 결정보다 작은 학습 단위로 다룰 수 있다.

name: Naming clarity tidy

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-summary-only-naming-clarity Naming clarity tidy  이름 정리는 구조를 바꾸기 전에 독자가 코드 의

summary: 이름 정리는 구조를 바꾸기 전에 독자가 코드 의도를 더 빨리 찾도록 만드는 작은 정리다.

name: Guarded flow tidy

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-summary-only-guarded-flow Guarded flow tidy  조건 흐름 정리는 핵심 경로를 드러내고 예외 처리를 주

summary: 조건 흐름 정리는 핵심 경로를 드러내고 예외 처리를 주변부로 밀어 읽기 순서를 단순화한다.

name: Interface narrowing tidy

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: tidy-summary-only-interface-narrowing Interface narrowing tidy  인터페이스를 좁히는 정리는 호

summary: 인터페이스를 좁히는 정리는 호출자가 알아야 할 표면을 줄여 변경 가능성을 높인다.

name: Tidy-before decision

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: decision-summary-only-tidy-before Tidy-before decision  행동 변경 전 정리는 이해 비용을 낮추지만

summary: 행동 변경 전 정리는 이해 비용을 낮추지만 변경 목적이 흐려질 만큼 커지면 분리해야 한다.

name: Tidy-after decision

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: decision-summary-only-tidy-after Tidy-after decision  행동 변경 후 정리는 새 지식이 생긴 뒤 구조를

summary: 행동 변경 후 정리는 새 지식이 생긴 뒤 구조를 다듬는 선택이며 즉시성보다 안정성을 우선한다.

name: Coupling signal

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: theory-summary-only-coupling-signal Coupling signal  함께 바뀌는 요소는 결합 신호이며 정리는 이 신호

summary: 함께 바뀌는 요소는 결합 신호이며 정리는 이 신호를 더 작고 명확한 구조로 재배치하려는 활동이다.

name: Cohesion signal

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: theory-summary-only-cohesion-signal Cohesion signal  응집도는 같은 이유로 바뀌는 요소가 가까이 있는지

summary: 응집도는 같은 이유로 바뀌는 요소가 가까이 있는지 판단하는 구조 품질 신호다.

name: Tidy batch size

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: management-summary-only-batch-size Tidy batch size  정리 batch는 되돌리기 쉽고 리뷰 가능한 크기일

summary: 정리 batch는 되돌리기 쉽고 리뷰 가능한 크기일 때 행동 변경과 혼선을 줄인다.

name: Cosmetic drift risk

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: warning-summary-only-cosmetic-drift Cosmetic drift risk  의미 없는 미용 정리가 커지면 변경 이유와

summary: 의미 없는 미용 정리가 커지면 변경 이유와 검증 기준을 흐릴 수 있다.

name: Option expiry

source_refs.section: public-safe topic: theory-summary-only-option-expiry Option expiry  정리 선택지는 시간이 지나며 가치가 바뀌므로 지금 할지

summary: 정리 선택지는 시간이 지나며 가치가 바뀌므로 지금 할지 나중에 할지의 경제성을 함께 본다.
